title: Nom Nom Kids small ziplock bags Monster snack bag collection | 4 Reusable bags in 3 sizes. 2 x small, 1 medium, 1 sandwich bag sized for toddlers and children | small ziplock bags for food
features: 🥝 CLEVER FOOD STORAGE: 3 sizes of bags included - the perfect sizes for a child snack & lunch portion and Baby led weaning finger foods like carrots, cucumber, baby tomatoes, raisins, nuts, seeds, biscuits, crisps flapjacks, apple slices, satsuma segments, grapes, treats and so much more! A strong double-zip, air tight seal keeps the pouch closed! No leakages guaranteed!

🍎 VERSATILE AND EASY TO FILL: Use the snack bags for healthy snacks on days out, nursery, pre-school or school or use them to portion control the naughty treats. The base of the bag expands for extra volume and the bags stand up on their own so snacks can be easily accessed whilst they play.

🍉 EASY TO CLEAN: The wide opening means you can reach every part of the pouch to ensure it's totally clean when washing. The wide opening and gusset panel ensure that the pouch stays fully open in the Dishwasher. Also freezer safe.

🍊 FUN, ECO FRIENDLY DESIGN: Kids love the Monster designs and help make healthy snacks more fun, Great for toddler snacks, nursery snacks or school snacks and sandwiches too. More convenient than snack pots - no lids to lose and they fold flat after use! An eco-friendly alternative to single use zip seal bags.
🍍 HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: BPA free, Phthalate and PVC free. High Quality, strong snack pouches for kids, Dishwasher safe & Freezer safe. All food grade materials to comply with EU Directive 10/2011.
